config.notFound: No configuration found. Running setup wizard...
config.fileNotFoundHint: Running setup wizard to create initial configuration...
config.fileCorruptedHint: Will run setup wizard to recreate...

auth.title: Firebase Authentication
auth.startingCallback: Starting local callback server on port {{port}}...
auth.manualAuthHint: If browser doesn't open, authenticate manually:
auth.noRefreshToken: No refresh token available. Re-authentication required.
auth.refreshTokenExpired: Refresh token expired or invalid. Re-authentication required.

tools.title: Tool Detection
tools.gitDisabledHint: Git features will be disabled in this session.
tools.gitInstallHint: Install Git to enable version control features:
tools.ripgrepDisabledHint: Fast search features will be disabled in this session.
tools.ripgrepInstallHint: Install ripgrep for high-performance code search:

features.title: Available Features
features.userAuthEnabledHint1: Requires Firebase authentication for all connections
features.userAuthDisabledHint1: Connections protected by secret signing key only
features.userAuthDisabledHint2: Lower latency, no Firebase auth required

connection.title: Connecting to Relay Server
connection.scanQR: Scan this QR code with Spck Editor mobile app:
connection.name: Name: {{name}}
connection.relayServerMismatch: IMPORTANT: The client must select the same relay server
connection.noExisting: No existing connection found. Connecting to proxy...
connection.settingsCorrupted: Connection settings corrupted, will reconnect to proxy...
connection.newDeviceWarning: This is the first time this device has connected.
connection.newDeviceCompromised: If you did not initiate this connection, your credentials may be compromised.
connection.protocolUnsupported: Unsupported protocol version {{version}} from {{deviceId}}. This CLI only supports protocol v1. An upgrade is required: update your client/library (and this CLI, if applicable) to the latest version so protocol versions match. If you installed the CLI globally, run: npm i -g spck@latest
connection.connectFailed: Failed to connect to relay server
connection.connectFailedCause1: - Server is not reachable (check your internet connection)
connection.rejectingUserVerification: Rejecting protocol_selected - user verification required but not completed: {{deviceId}}
connection.freeTierNotice: Free account: {{used}} / {{limit}} min used today ({{remaining}} min remaining)

multipleConnection.rejectedHint: For security reasons, new connections are rejected by default.
multipleConnection.restartHint: If you want to allow multiple connections, restart the CLI.
multipleConnection.compromiseWarning: If you did not initiate this connection, your client ID
multipleConnection.compromiseHint: may have been compromised. Consider regenerating it.

proxyError.tokenExpiredTimeout: Your access token has expired or timed out.
proxyError.tokenExpiredHint: Please try again or re-authenticate with: spck auth login
proxyError.tokenRevoked: Your login token has been revoked.
proxyError.tokenRevokedHint: Please re-authenticate: spck auth logout && spck auth login
proxyError.privacyConsentHint1: Please accept the privacy policy in the Spck Editor app
proxyError.privacyConsentHint2: under Account Settings to use this feature.
proxyError.accountDeletingHint: Please wait 72 hours before trying again.
proxyError.accountBannedHint1: Your account has been banned for violation of the
proxyError.subscriptionCheckFailedHint: This may be a temporary issue. Please try again later.
proxyError.subscriptionRequired: This feature requires a paid subscription.
proxyError.subscriptionRequiredHint: Open the Spck Editor app to upgrade to Supporter or Gold.
proxyError.maxConnectionsHint: Close other CLI instances and try again.
proxyError.duplicateClientId: A CLI with this client ID is already connected.
proxyError.duplicateHint2: - Another CLI instance is still running with the same connection
proxyError.duplicateHint3: - A previous connection did not properly disconnect
proxyError.duplicateHint5: 1. Close any other running CLI instances
proxyError.duplicateHint6: 2. Wait a few seconds for the previous connection to timeout
proxyError.firebaseExpiredRefreshFailed: Firebase token expired and refresh failed.
proxyError.firebaseInvalidHint1: The token may be corrupted or from a different account.
proxyError.firebaseTokenExpiring: Firebase token expired. Attempting to refresh...
proxyError.dailyLimitExceeded: Daily free tier limit of 30 minutes has been reached.
proxyError.dailyLimitExceededHint: Open the Spck Editor app to upgrade to Supporter or Gold for unlimited CLI access.
proxyError.defaultError: A problem occurred when verifying your subscription.

errors.permissionError: Permission Error: Cannot write to required directory
errors.permissionFixHint: Or ensure your user has write access to the home directory.
errors.diskFull: Disk Full: No space left on device
errors.diskFullHint: Please free up disk space and try again.
errors.cannotConnectHint: Please check the proxy URL and try again.
errors.rootNotFoundHint: Please ensure the directory exists and is accessible, or run setup wizard:
errors.cliErrorHint: Run with --help to see available commands and options.

logout.title: Logout
logout.noCredentials: No credentials or connection settings found
logout.notLoggedIn: You are not currently logged in.
logout.runAgain: Run the CLI again to re-authenticate.

setup.title: Spck Networking CLI - Initial Setup
setup.description1: This wizard will help you configure the Spck Networking CLI.
setup.description2: The CLI connects to a proxy server to enable remote access
setup.description3: to your local filesystem, git, and terminal.
setup.terminalDescription: Terminal service allows remote shell access to your machine.
setup.maxBufferHint: (Larger buffer stores more history but may slow synchronization)
setup.browserProxyDescription: Browser proxy allows Spck Editor to open a live preview of your local dev server inside the browser.
setup.securityDescription1: Additional user authentication adds an extra security layer
setup.securityDescription2: by requiring the client to verify their Firebase identity.
setup.securityDescription3: This increases initial connection time by ~3-15 seconds.
setup.gitignoreDetected: A .gitignore file was detected in your project directory.
setup.gitignoreRecommend1: It is recommended to add .spck-editor/ to .gitignore to prevent
setup.gitignoreRecommend2: accidentally committing the directory to version control.
setup.gitignoreManualHint: You can manually add .spck-editor/ to your .gitignore file.
